## Summary

Rebalances the evaluation report header layout:

- **Submission Preview** pinned to fixed 320px right column (was floating with inconsistent min/max widths)
- Metadata `<dl>` grid now uses `lg:grid-cols-4` with uniform `gap-x-10 gap-y-6` (was duplicated gap values and mixed 3/4 col breakpoints)
- Preview section gets `px-5 py-4` padding with `leading-relaxed` text for readability
- Top-level grid simplified to `xl:grid-cols-[1fr_320px]` (was `xl:grid-cols-[minmax(0,1fr)_minmax(320px,360px)] xl:grid-cols-[minmax(0,1fr)_minmax(360px,400px)]` — duplicate declaration)

## Scope

- `app/evaluate/[jobId]/page.tsx` — layout classes only, no logic changes

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

None — CSS class changes only.

No-Pipeline-Impact: yes — UI layout change, no evaluation pipeline code touched"
